measurement.method_description: Simulations in NPT ensemble. Fit of density over different temperatures using f(T)= rho_0 + exp( - ( 0.5 * A2 * ( T**2 - T0**2 ) + A1 * ( T - T0 ) ) ). Leading to alpha = A2*temperature + A1
